component.name: Black Curtain
component.summary: Fill a monitor with a solid color

description.p: A simple utility to dim or black out a specific monitor. Turning a monitor off causes the OS to rearrange windows and change brightness programmatically is unreliable — Black Curtain solves this by displaying a solid color overlay in fullscreen instead.
Supports custom hex colors, fullscreen toggle via double‑click or Space key, and minimization via right‑click or Enter.
